ruleset_version: Regelverk 2 - Operativt verifieringsregelverk för Certificate of Origin

certificate.label: Document A
certificate.notes: Original EU Certificate of Origin issued by West Sweden Chamber of Commerce, Göteborg. Text-based PDF, high readability.

invoice.label: Document B
invoice.notes: Two-page commercial invoice from Calderys Nordic AB. Text-based PDF, high readability.

lc_check.lc_validation_steps: Searched certificate for LC/L/C/Letter of Credit/Documentary Credit references. The certificate contains reference no 'SEG-26D-462916' and order reference '2254546024'. Neither of these is preceded by or associated with a bank term designation such as 'L/C', 'Letter of Credit', or 'Documentary Credit'. No LC-undantag activated.

search_results.context: Invoice header footer block: 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden / Address: Box 216, SE-263 23 Höganäs'
Footer: 'Säte: Höganäs - Godkänd för F-skatt - VAT No. SE556012980001'
'Best regards Calderys Nordic AB' and footer with same company details

consignor_search_step2b.conclusion: Consignor name 'Calderys Nordic AB' found multiple times in invoice file — in header, footer, VAT block, and signature block. Koncernstruktur rule 4.1.0 applicable.

candidates.raw_text: Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 Sadar Nagpur, India
candidates.normalized_text: fidvi tower, 6th floor, opposite saraf chambers, mount road, 440001 sadar nagpur, india

candidates.source: Invoice header/branding and footer, page 1 and 2
Invoice header 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden' and VAT prefix SE

candidates.raw_text: Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA
candidates.normalized_text: fidvi tower, 6th floor, opposite saraf chambers, mount road, 440001 sadar nagpur, india

criteria_checked.detail: Certificate remarks box 5 contains reference '2254546024' which matches invoice 'Reference no: 2254546024'.
Certificate consignor 'Calderys Nordic AB' is identified as invoice issuer in header, footer, and signature block.
Certificate consignee 'Calderys India Refractories Limited' is identified in invoice Company (Bill-to) and Delivery address blocks.

pairing_validation.notes: All three criteria satisfied. Pairing is valid.

consignor.certificate_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Forshammarsgatan 2, 66232, Åmål, Sweden
consignor.invoice_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden (header/footer); Box 216, SE-263 23 Höganäs (address); VAT No. SE556012980001

comparison_steps.description: Search for consignor name in all invoice pages
comparison_steps.detail: Consignor name 'Calderys Nordic AB' found explicitly in invoice header ('Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'), footer ('Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'), VAT block, and signature block ('Best regards Calderys Nordic AB'). Name is identical after normalization.
Invoice explicitly states 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden'. Additionally, VAT prefix 'SE' in 'SE556012980001' and IBAN prefix 'SE' both confirm Sweden.

rules_applied.description: Koncernstruktur – consignor name found explicitly in invoice
Land verification via indirect identifiers (VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE, explicit 'Sweden' text)

consignor.debug_explanation: Certificate consignor: 'Calderys Nordic AB, Forshammarsgatan 2, 66232, Åmål, Sweden'. Invoice issuer (from header/footer): 'Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden, Box 216, SE-263 23 Höganäs'. Name matches exactly: 'Calderys Nordic AB'. Country: certificate says 'Sweden', invoice says 'Sweden' explicitly and SE VAT prefix confirms. Address differs (Forshammarsgatan 2 vs Box 216) but per rule 4.1.5 address differences do not cause MISMATCH — only name and country matter. MATCH via 4.1.0 (name found in invoice) and 4.1.2.1 (country verified).
consignor.motivation: Consignor 'Calderys Nordic AB' is explicitly identified in the invoice as the issuer (header, footer, signature, VAT block). Country 'Sweden' is confirmed via explicit text and SE VAT prefix. Address difference (street vs box) is not grounds for MISMATCH per rule 4.1.5.

consignee.certificate_value: Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 Sadar Nagpur, India
consignee.invoice_value: Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA

comparison_steps.detail: Invoice 'Company' block contains 'Calderys India Refractories Limited' with address 'Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA'. Name and country match exactly.

rules_applied.description: Priority 1 – Billing field (Company block) used for consignee verification

consignee.debug_explanation: Certificate consignee: 'Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 Sadar Nagpur, India'. Invoice Company (Bill-to): 'Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA'. Name match: exact. Address match: exact after case normalization (Sadar Nagpur vs SADAR NAGPUR). Country match: India = INDIA. MATCH.
consignee.motivation: Consignee 'Calderys India Refractories Limited' is identified exactly in the invoice Company (Bill-to) block with matching address and country (India).

comparison_steps.description: Certificate does not explicitly list an article number (no Code/Article No. field). Invoice has code 1015528. No article number in certificate to verify. Move to Priority 2.

comparison_steps.detail: Certificate goods: 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8'. Invoice goods: 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8'. Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning: 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8'. After normalization (case, trademark symbol removal, comma vs period as decimal in product code context): 'svenska mix 7 a60 0.8' vs 'svenska mix 7 a60 0.8'. The comma in '0,8' and period in '0.8' represent the same value (European vs English decimal notation). These are identical. The '™' symbol is a non-identitetsbärande trademark notation — per 4.3.4, such additions do not affect product identity.

comparison_steps.description: CALDERYS INDIA appears in certificate goods description as a consignee marking/label, not a product name component. ™ symbol in invoice is a trademark notation.
comparison_steps.detail: 'CALDERYS INDIA' in certificate box 6 is a consignee/shipping mark, not part of the product identity. '™' in invoice is a trademark symbol. Neither affects the identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning.

rules_applied.description: Controlled text matching – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8' matches 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8' after normalization
Non-identity-bearing additions (trademark symbol ™, consignee marking 'CALDERYS INDIA') do not affect product identity

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Comma in '0,8' vs period in '0.8' represents a different product variant
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: European decimal notation uses comma; English uses period. '0,8' and '0.8' represent the same value. This is a standard formatting variation, not a product difference.

goods_description.debug_explanation: Certificate box 6 contains 'CALDERYS INDIA / Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8'. 'CALDERYS INDIA' is a consignee/shipping mark. The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning is 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8'. Invoice line description is 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8'. After normalization: case → 'svenska mix 7 a60 0,8' vs 'svenska mix 7 a60 0.8'; trademark symbol ™ removed; comma/period decimal difference normalized. All words match in same order: svenska, mix, 7, a60, 0.8. MATCH per 4.3.3.
goods_description.motivation: The identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8' from the certificate matches the invoice description 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8' after normalization of case and decimal notation. The trademark symbol ™ is a non-identity-bearing addition.

quantity.invoice_value: 25,200 TO (25,200 metric tons = 25,200 kg after analysis)

comparison_steps.description: Certificate states NW 25,200 kg. Search for 25,200 kg or 25200 in invoice.
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice line item quantity is '25,200' with unit 'TO'. The numeric value 25,200 is present. However, 'TO' typically means metric ton (1 TO = 1000 KG). Certificate says 25,200 kg (NW). If invoice 25,200 is in TO (metric tons), then 25,200 TO = 25,200,000 kg — which does NOT match 25,200 kg. Need to analyze whether '25,200' in invoice means 25.200 (with comma as thousands separator) or 25,200 (twenty-five thousand two hundred).

comparison_steps.description: Determine whether '25,200' in both documents uses comma as thousands separator or decimal separator
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate: 'NW 25,200 kg'. In Swedish/European context, comma can be decimal separator (25.200 kg = 25.2 kg) or thousands separator (25,200 = 25200 kg). Given the product is a refractory mix and the invoice unit price is 110 EUR/TO, 25.2 kg (0.0252 TO) at 110 EUR/TO would be only 2.77 EUR total — BUT the invoice shows total 2,772.00 EUR. If 25,200 TO = 25.2 TO (comma as decimal), then 25.2 × 110 = 2,772.00 EUR — this matches perfectly. So in the invoice, '25,200 TO' means 25.200 metric tons (comma is thousands separator showing 25 point 200 = 25.2 TO). Certificate: 'NW 25,200 kg'. If comma is thousands separator: 25200 kg = 25.2 MT. If comma is decimal: 25.200 kg = 25.2 kg. Given 25.2 MT = 25,200 kg, and the invoice confirms 25.2 TO (metric tons) via price calculation (25.2 × 110 = 2,772), the certificate value of 25,200 kg = 25200 kg = 25.2 MT.

comparison_steps.description: Convert invoice TO (metric tons) to KG
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice: 25.200 TO (25.2 metric tons). Conversion: 25.2 MT × 1000 = 25,200 KG. Certificate: NW 25,200 kg (where comma is thousands separator = 25200 kg). 25,200 KG = 25,200 KG. Match confirmed. Tolerance check: exact match (0% deviation).

rules_applied.description: Box 7 contains 'NW 25,200 kg' — this is the verifieringsgrundande kvantitet
Undantag 3B – Enhetsomräkning MT ↔ KG: 25.2 TO × 1000 = 25,200 KG matches certificate NW 25,200 kg
Tusentalsavskiljare normalization: '25,200' interpreted as 25200 (comma as thousands separator) in both documents

rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: At 110 EUR/TO, 25200 TO would cost 2,772,000 EUR — but invoice total is 2,772.00 EUR. This confirms 25,200 TO = 25.2 metric tons (comma as thousands separator showing 3 decimal places).

rejected_hypotheses.hypothesis: Certificate '25,200 kg' means 25.200 kg (25.2 kg with comma as decimal)
rejected_hypotheses.rejection_reason: 25.2 kg of refractory material at industrial scale with invoice total 2,772 EUR and 110 EUR/TO would imply only 0.0252 TO × 110 = 2.77 EUR — inconsistent with invoice total. Therefore 25,200 kg = 25200 kg (comma as thousands separator).

quantity.debug_explanation: Certificate box 7: 'NW 25,200 kg'. Invoice: quantity '25,200', unit 'TO'. The invoice total calculation (25.2 TO × 110 EUR/TO = 2,772 EUR) confirms that '25,200 TO' means 25.2 metric tons. Certificate '25,200 kg' with comma as thousands separator = 25200 kg. Applying undantag 3B: 25.2 MT × 1000 = 25200 KG = 25,200 KG. Certificate value 25,200 KG NW. Exact match. Viktkategori: certificate specifies NW. Invoice does not specify GW/NW explicitly for this quantity, but there is only one weight/quantity value in the invoice — per rule 4.4.2.2 point 2, when certificate has one weight value and invoice confirms the same numeric value without a contradicting alternative → MATCH.
quantity.motivation: Certificate states NW 25,200 kg (= 25200 kg). Invoice states 25,200 TO (= 25.2 metric tons, confirmed by price calculation). Applying undantag 3B (MT↔KG conversion): 25.2 MT × 1000 = 25,200 KG. Exact match. Weight category NW specified in certificate; invoice has only one quantity value without contradicting alternative.

comparison_steps.description: Search for origin statement in invoice
comparison_steps.detail: Invoice page 1 contains 'MADE IN SWEDEN' — this is an explicit origin statement.

comparison_steps.step: 4.5.4.2.1 – EU + specific member state vs invoice
comparison_steps.description: Certificate states 'EU Sweden'. Invoice states 'MADE IN SWEDEN'.
comparison_steps.detail: Certificate origin: 'EU Sweden' — EU combined with one specific EU member state (Sweden). Invoice origin: 'MADE IN SWEDEN' — confirms Sweden. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1: when certificate states 'EU [land]' (EU + one specific EU member state) and invoice contains explicit origin confirmation of that member state, this is MATCH. Sweden is an EU member state. The invoice confirms Sweden as origin. Additionally per 4.5.4.2: if certificate states a specific EU member and invoice confirms that country → verified.

rules_applied.description: Origin identified in invoice via 'MADE IN SWEDEN'
Certificate states 'EU Sweden', invoice states 'MADE IN SWEDEN' — Sweden is EU member, direct match
EU + one specific EU member state: invoice confirms 'MADE IN SWEDEN' which satisfies both EU and Sweden claims

country_of_origin.debug_explanation: Certificate box 3: 'EU Sweden'. Invoice: 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. The certificate claims origin is EU, specifically Sweden. The invoice explicitly states 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state (SE in EU-27). Per rule 4.5.4.2, certificate=specific EU member ↔ invoice confirms that country → verified. Per rule 4.5.4.2.1, certificate='EU Sweden' (EU + one member state) and invoice confirms Sweden → MATCH. No contradicting origin information in invoice. MATCH.
country_of_origin.motivation: Certificate states origin 'EU Sweden'. Invoice explicitly states 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Sweden is an EU member state. Both the EU-level and country-level claims are satisfied by the invoice's origin statement.

evidence.relevance: Country verification via VAT prefix SE = Sweden

evidence.raw_text: Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA
Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA
evidence.relevance: Additional confirmation of consignee in delivery address
Quantity value and unit for verification
Price calculation confirms 25.2 TO × 110 = 2772 EUR, establishing comma as thousands separator

rule_evaluation_log.detail: No LC/Letter of Credit reference found in certificate. Certificate reference 'SEG-26D-462916' and order '2254546024' are not LC references.
Document A is certificate (Certificate of Origin), Document B is invoice (Commercial Invoice). No ambiguity. Single invoice in invoice file.

All three criteria met: (1) Certificate reference 2254546024 matches invoice Reference no, (2) Consignor Calderys Nordic AB is invoice issuer, (3) Consignee Calderys India Refractories Limited is in invoice Company block.
Calderys Nordic AB found in invoice header, footer, VAT block, and signature block.
Sweden confirmed via explicit text, VAT prefix SE, IBAN prefix SE.
Invoice Company (Bill-to) block contains exact consignee name and address.

rule_evaluation_log.description: Controlled text matching for goods description
rule_evaluation_log.detail: Identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8' matches 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8' after normalization.
™ symbol and 'CALDERYS INDIA' marking do not change product identity.
Box 7 contains 'NW 25,200 kg' — used as primary quantity.
Invoice 25.2 TO × 1000 = 25,200 KG matches certificate NW 25,200 kg.
Comma in '25,200' interpreted as thousands separator in both documents, confirmed by price calculation.
'MADE IN SWEDEN' found in invoice text block.
Certificate 'EU Sweden' ↔ Invoice 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Sweden is EU member.
Certificate 'EU Sweden' with invoice 'MADE IN SWEDEN' satisfies both EU and Sweden claims.

overall_assessment.human_explanation: Alla kontrollpunkter överensstämmer. Avsändaren Calderys Nordic AB, Sverige, identifieras som fakturautställare. Mottagaren Calderys India Refractories Limited, Indien, överensstämmer exakt med fakturans köpare. Varubeskrivningen Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8 matchar fakturans SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8. Kvantiteten 25 200 kg NW bekräftas via enhetsomräkning (25,2 ton i fakturan). Ursprungsland Sverige bekräftas av fakturans angivelse 'MADE IN SWEDEN'.
overall_assessment.summary: All five checkpoints verified as MATCH. Consignor (Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden) identified as invoice issuer. Consignee (Calderys India Refractories Limited, India) matches invoice buyer. Goods description matches after normalization. Quantity confirmed via MT↔KG conversion. Origin 'EU Sweden' confirmed by 'MADE IN SWEDEN'.

human_readable_report.title: Verifieringsrapport – Certificate of Origin mot faktura

sections.certificate_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Forshammarsgatan 2, 66232, Åmål, Sweden
sections.invoice_value: Calderys Nordic AB, Sweden (fakturautställare i sidhuvud/sidfot, VAT No. SE556012980001)
sections.rule_applied: Koncernstruktur (4.1.0) – företagsnamnet identifierat i fakturans sidhuvud och sidfot. Land verifierat via explicit text och SE VAT-prefix.
sections.motivation: Calderys Nordic AB identifieras uttryckligen som fakturautställare. Landet Sverige bekräftas via explicit text och VAT-prefix SE. Adressskillnad (Forshammarsgatan vs Box 216) påverkar inte bedömningen.

sections.certificate_value: Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 Sadar Nagpur, India
sections.invoice_value: Calderys India Refractories Limited, Fidvi Tower, 6th floor, Opposite Saraf Chambers, Mount Road, 440001 SADAR NAGPUR, INDIA
sections.rule_applied: Faktureringspart (4.2.0.2) – mottagare identifierad i fakturans Company-block (Bill-to).
sections.motivation: Exakt namnmatchning och fullständig adressöverensstämmelse inklusive land (India). Identisk juridisk part bekräftad.

sections.rule_applied: Kontrollerad textmatchning (4.3.3) – identitetsbärande huvudbeteckning matchar efter normalisering av versaler, varumärkessymbol och decimalnotation.
sections.motivation: 'Svenska Mix 7 A60 0,8' i certifikatet matchar 'SVENSKA™ MIX 7 A60 0.8' i fakturan. Skillnader avser versaler/gemener, ™-symbol (icke-identitetsbärande) och decimalnotation (komma vs punkt). 'CALDERYS INDIA' är en kollimärkning, inte del av produktnamnet.

sections.rule_applied: Undantag 3B (4.4.5.3) – enhetsomräkning MT↔KG. 25,200 TO = 25,2 metriska ton = 25 200 KG.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger NW 25 200 kg. Fakturan anger 25,200 TO (25,2 metriska ton, bekräftat via priskalkyl: 25,2 × 110 = 2 772 EUR). Omräkning: 25,2 MT × 1000 = 25 200 KG. Exakt matchning.

sections.rule_applied: EU-medlemslandsnormalisering (4.5.4.2, 4.5.4.2.1) – 'EU Sweden' i certifikatet verifierat mot 'MADE IN SWEDEN' i fakturan.
sections.motivation: Certifikatet anger 'EU Sweden'. Fakturan anger 'MADE IN SWEDEN'. Sverige är EU-medlemsstat. Fakturans ursprungsangivelse bekräftar både EU-tillhörighet och specifikt land.

human_readable_report.conclusion: Samtliga kontrollpunkter verifierade som MATCH. Dokumentparet uppfyller kraven för automatiskt godkännande.

output_quality_checks.notes: All checkpoints MATCH with confidence ≥ 0.95. No inconsistencies detected between motivations and statuses. comparison_result IDENTICAL is consistent with all checkpoints being MATCH. Minimum confidence 0.95 across all checkpoints exceeds the 0.85 floor.
